user.title: Home Intercom
user.description: Set up your first room. You can add more later via Options.

abort.no_media_players: No media_player entities found in Home Assistant.
abort.already_configured: Home Intercom is already configured. Use the Configure button to manage rooms.

init.title: Manage Rooms
init.description: {room_count} room(s) configured. Choose a room to edit or add a new one.

yaml_info.title: YAML Configured Rooms
yaml_info.description: {room_count} room(s) from configuration.yaml. To modify, edit configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant.

add_room.title: Add Room
add_room.description: Select area and media player. Room name defaults to area name.

edit_room.title: Edit Room — {room_name}
edit_room.description: Change the media player entity for this room. Set volume/buffer to 0 to use defaults.

error.room_exists: A room with this area is already configured.

abort.yaml_read_only: YAML configured rooms are read-only. Edit configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant.
abort.buttons_read_only: Intercom button devices are auto-managed — no configuration needed. They appear automatically when an ESP32 button checks in.

yaml_device_delete_blocked.message: "{name}" is a YAML-configured device and cannot be deleted via UI. Edit configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant.

yaml_entry_delete_blocked.message: "{title}" is a YAML-configured integration and cannot be deleted via UI. Edit configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant.
